meaning: n.接缝,接合处,接合点,关节,(牛、羊等的腿)大块肉adj.共同的,联合的,连接的,合办的vt.连接,接合,使有接头vi.贴合,生节
examples: They issued a joint statement denying the charges.
It would have to grow by acquisitions or joint ventures to achieve global reach.
They finished in joint first place.
But if you die, the account bypasses your estate and belongs to the joint holder.
This new arthroplastic joint would be hammered into my upper arm and then cemented to my clavicle.
